caption: A man in a blue vest speaks into several microphones held by surrounding people in an outdoor setting, with a news banner stating "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The scene shifts to a wider shot showing a group of men, including one in a dark jacket and white beanie and another in a black police uniform, standing near a white vehicle. On-screen graphics include the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a panel of portrait photos with names like "डिप्टी CM", "सब्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "संतोष सुमन", and "सुमित कुमार". As the scene progresses, the camera focuses on the white vehicle and the uniformed officer, while the news banner remains constant. The time "10:05 PM" and the word "MAHASAMODH" are visible at the bottom. In the final frame, additional red text "RJD पर" appears on the screen.
